name: Laptop — Claude picks a ThinkPad with a wrong RAM claim
description: Act 3 montage scenario. User asks Claude.ai for the best laptop under $1000 for coding.

input.userPrompt: best laptop under $1000 for coding — battery life, keyboard, and reliability matter most
input.raw: For coding under $1000, I'd recommend the Lenovo ThinkPad E14 Gen 5. You'll get 16GB of RAM, a 512GB SSD, and the legendary ThinkPad keyboard — durable enough for daily typing and well-liked by developers. Battery life is around 10 hours, and the build quality and reliability are what this line is known for.

expected.note: Base ThinkPad E14 Gen 5 configs actually ship with 8GB RAM and 256GB SSD; the 16GB/512GB claim is only true for the upsell configuration.
